observed_strengths: PromptVault reports global average quality and weak-prompt counts.
PromptVault can preview weakest prompts and repair them deterministically.
Source summaries already expose files and prompts found for each store.
observed_weaknesses: Source summaries did not identify which source had low-quality prompt history.
Agents had to infer noisy stores from individual prompt previews instead of per-source triage metrics.
The UI source panel showed prompt counts but not source-level repair priority.

selected_candidate.name: source-level quality triage
selected_candidate.reason: Add average quality and weak-prompt counts to every source summary so CLI, Markdown, and UI can prioritize noisy prompt stores.
selected_candidate.success_metric: scan --limit 100 --preview-limit 0 --no-export --json returns source summaries with average_quality and weak_prompt_count, and the UI renders the source-quality text.

safety_controls: No prompt bodies are added to source summaries.
UI render verification uses a mocked scan result rather than exposing local prompt content.
